Fig. 2. Mean and std values of sFNC and GMV features from real and generated data using graph-based multimodal VAE (gMMVAE), latent diffusion model (gLDM), and diffusion transformer (gDiT). It can be noted that gMMVAE is better at preserving both the mean and standard deviation in the data.
Table 2. Comparison of reconstruction evaluation performance across fMRI and sMRI modalities for various generative models
